message:
fix(heredoc,git): correct heredoc target extraction order and harden git patterns

heredoc.rs:
- Fix extract_heredoc_target_command to walk tokens in original order
  (reversed from the backwards parse) so the first real command token
  is identified instead of the last argument before the heredoc operator.
- Skip shell env assignments (VAR=value) when searching for the target.
- Skip common shell wrappers (sudo, env, nohup, etc.) to find the
  actual command that consumes the heredoc.

history/schema.rs:
- Refactor SQL migrations and schema definitions for clarity.

packs/core/git.rs:
- Harden git destructive command patterns.

Cargo.toml: Bump fsqlite crates from 0.1.1 to 0.1.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
